overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain, transitioning from an elevated glass-enclosed overpass to a narrow street-level market adorned with red paper lanterns and vibrant neon signage. The footage showcases wet reflective surfaces, Asian-inspired architecture mixed with futuristic elements, and a dense atmospheric urban environment typical of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian overpass with glass railings overlooking city traffic

events.description: approaches end of overpass and scene fades to black

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated glass-enclosed overpass looking down at the rainy city streets below

notable_agents.action: two people walking toward the camera on the overpass

entered.detail: transparent glass panels with metal frames separating the walkway from the drop
structural metal beams supporting the overpass roof and railings
wet concrete pedestrian path with rain reflections
tall buildings with glowing windows and neon signs visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian overpass enclosed by glass railings, overlooking a rain-soaked city street at night. The camera moves forward along the concrete walkway, with metal support beams framing the view of distant illuminated buildings and sparse traffic below. Two pedestrians approach from the opposite direction as the scene nears its end.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with hanging red paper lanterns and food stalls

events.description: hard cut to street level in a narrow alley adorned with red paper lanterns
passing under brighter neon signs creates shifting colored reflections on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow market street lined with hanging red lanterns and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in a yellow jacket standing near a storefront looking at goods

entered.detail: numerous red and white paper lanterns hanging overhead in a continuous line
green canvas awning covering an outdoor food vendor area with tables
bright neon sign with Korean characters indicating an open restaurant
blue and red plastic chairs and tables arranged on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Following a hard cut from the overpass, the scene shifts to a narrow street-level market alley dense with hanging red paper lanterns and vibrant neon signage. The camera proceeds forward past food stalls with green canopies on the left and glowing storefronts on the right, navigating around plastic furniture while the wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: market area with vending machines leading to an overlook

events.description: passing a large neon arrow sign, the market area opens up with more vertical space
approaching metal railing and slowing to look down into the lower level

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market past vending machines and approaching a railing to look down into a lower street level

entered.detail: black automated vending machine with glowing product displays and yellow warning labels
large illuminated arrow sign with the number 24 pointing left
traditional wooden shelter with open sides and a dark roof
black metal railing marking the edge of an overlook
view down into a lower street level with distant lights and structures

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through a more open market area featuring a prominent neon arrow sign and automated vending machines. The camera passes a wooden gazebo structure on the left before approaching a metal safety railing. The scene concludes with the camera slowing to look down over the railing into a foggy lower level of the city, with the red lanterns now visible only in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from an elevated, sterile overpass down into the vibrant, rain-slicked depths of a neon-lit street market. It begins on a concrete pedestrian walkway enclosed by glass railings, moving forward past metal support beams and oncoming pedestrians while overlooking the illuminated city below. The perspective then shifts abruptly into a narrow alleyway, where the open air is replaced by a dense canopy of hanging red paper lanterns and glowing neon signage reflecting off the wet pavement. As the camera navigates past green-canopied food stalls and plastic furniture, the scene expands into a more open market area featuring automated vending machines and a wooden gazebo. Finally, the movement slows as the camera approaches a metal safety railing, turning to look down into a foggy lower level of the city while the red lanterns fade into the distant background.
